migrations.reason: MoonNotification now wraps the Longbridge Notification entry type, applications import it from moon_ui, and direct moon_ui::components::notification use was removed from MoonTerminal.

MoonDialog now wraps the Longbridge Dialog builder, application dialogs use MoonWindowExt::open_moon_dialog/open_unique_moon_dialog, and raw moon_ui::components::dialog was removed from the public facade.

MoonList now exposes the Longbridge List/ListState delegate engine through the moon_ui facade, preserving focus, keyboard navigation, virtual rows, search hooks and selection while gallery exercises the Moon-facing path.

MoonTree now exposes the Longbridge Tree/TreeState engine through the moon_ui facade, preserving expand/collapse events, keyboard navigation, virtual rendering and context menu lifecycle while gallery exercises the Moon-facing path.

The raw menu escape hatch was replaced by the explicit MoonNativeMenu facade. In-window overlays stay on MoonContextMenu/MoonPopupMenu; OS-native popup behavior is exposed only as moon_ui::MoonNativeMenu.
